contributions.desc: The batteries-included full-stack framework for the AI era. Develop JS/TS web apps (React, Node.js, and Prisma) using declarative code that abstracts away complex full-stack features like auth, background jobs, RPC, email sending, end-to-end type safety, single-command deployment, and more.
The open-source LLMOps platform: prompt playground, prompt management, LLM evaluation, and LLM observability all in one place.
ToolHive is an enterprise-grade platform for running and managing Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.
.NET (C#) Web App Framework Built For AI Coding Agents
Mercury dashboard code written in QML/C++
